meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Level Up Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus with AI-driven debugging. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality apps faster than your competitors.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing logs and guessing stack traces. By integrating Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative repairs, you transform debugging from a bottleneck into a competitive advantage. This workflow slashes resolution time by 70%, allowing you to ship complex, production-ready features while maintaining your freelance margins.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen at 2 AM, the client is breathing down your neck, and your codebase has morphed into a sprawling, unmanageable monolith of 'it works, I think.' You’ve hit the ceiling of basic app development, and the manual debugging process is eating your profit margins alive.

It’s time to stop treating AI as a chatbot and start treating it as your lead engineer. By leveraging Antigravity to map your logic flows and Claude Code to surgically inject fixes into your repo, you can move from 'stuck' to 'shipped' in minutes. This isn't just about fixing bugs; it's about reclaiming your time and scaling your freelance business.

steps.title: Map the Failure State
steps.description: Before fixing, visualize the logic path to pinpoint exactly where the state diverges from expectations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase and visualize the execution flow for the authentication module; highlight potential null pointer exceptions in the middleware.

steps.title: Contextualize the Bug
steps.description: Feed the error logs and the relevant file snippets directly into the AI context window.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the root cause of the error log provided below and suggest a refactor that adheres to SOLID principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Explain this stack trace and suggest a fix' --file ./src/api/handler.ts

steps.title: Surgical Code Injection
steps.description: Don't rewrite files; use Claude Code to apply targeted patches to minimize regression risk.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a non-breaking patch for this function that handles edge cases for empty input arrays.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Replace the current array validation with the optimized logic'

steps.title: Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix holds up by generating unit tests for the specific failing component.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test cases for the recently patched function, covering both happy path and error scenarios.

steps.title: Final Architectural Audit
steps.description: Perform a final check to ensure the patch hasn't introduced technical debt elsewhere in the system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the recent changes for performance bottlenecks or increased complexity metrics.

pro_tips: Always use the '--mode=silent' flag in Claude Code when you are confident in the AI's patch to speed up your workflow.
Maintain a 'context-summary.md' file in your root directory; update it whenever you make a major architectural change so your AI agent stays aligned.
When debugging complex state issues, ask the AI to generate a sequence diagram in Mermaid syntax to visualize the state changes.
Use Antigravity to identify 'God Objects'—classes that are doing too much—and proactively break them down before they become bugs.
Treat your CLI history as a documentation log; store successful debug patterns in a personal 'playbook' folder for recurring client issues.
content.next_steps: Integrate Claude Code into your CI/CD pipeline as a linting step to catch potential bugs before they reach your staging environment.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start mastering your craft. By automating the grunt work, you open the door to high-ticket projects and faster delivery cycles. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
